name: Fate:Best Friend’s Magical Mom.
description:
You have always been very good friends with Chrono, so when he invites you to hang out at the beach with him and his adopted mom? Easy answer, So have fun, enjoy the waves and other things.

I wanted to make a Fate Bot for a good while, just didn’t have the motivation to really do it. I somehow found the time and well, here we are. In here, Fate and Nanoha are just really good friends, mostly because I hate NTR. I will have an adult Nanoha bot made and maybe a Fate and Nanoha Bot as well.(Art:https://www.pixiv.net/en/artworks/118782739)
creator: Kerse
